changes.description: LOA Logs auto-start was temporarily disabled.
changes.details: The app no longer force-starts LOA Logs.exe as a workaround for cases where LOA Logs would launch but not function correctly when started by LOA Tracker.

changes.description: LOA Logs reminder banners were added.
changes.details: When LOA Logs is not running, the app now warns users to start it for full tracking support. The warning clears automatically once LOA Logs is detected.

changes.description: The app now prevents duplicate running instances.
changes.details: Starting the executable again while LOA Tracker is already open should focus/show the existing app instead of creating another tray icon and second running instance.

changes.description: Dashboard card and list layouts were reworked.
changes.details: Character cards now use tighter spacing, centered roster card grids, reduced dashboard side padding, and better responsive behavior between full card view and list view.

changes.description: Chaos and Guardian status is visible again.
changes.details: Cards and list rows show Chaos Dungeon and Guardian Raid state even when lazy behavior is active, greying the icons out when completed or currently resting.

changes.description: Daily progress is shown in compact contexts.
changes.details: Card-view mini cards and wide list rows now show compact Chaos and Guardian rested progress bars when there is enough space, while narrower layouts fall back to icons only.

changes.description: Non-gold earners can show tracked raid progress.
changes.details: Characters that do not earn gold now show their latest tracked raids in a blue tracked-raid style, including gate progress and completion state.

changes.description: Weekly fallback tasks were added for non-raid characters.
changes.details: Characters without tracked raids can show weekly tasks instead of looking empty. In list view, weekly-only rows can display up to four tracked weeklies side by side.

changes.description: Tracked weekly tasks now appear as compact icons.
changes.details: Tracked weeklies can appear as small icons in card and list views, with completed tasks greyed out and tooltips showing whether each task is open or done.

changes.description: Card-view top status icons were reorganized.
changes.details: Card view now places weekly shop/guild icons between the character info and Chaos/Guardian status icons, with Chaos and Guardian stacked in the top-right area.

changes.description: List view alignment was tightened.
changes.details: The list view now keeps raid difficulty visible for longer while resizing, reduces the character-name-to-stat gap first, and aligns iLvl and CP fields with fixed tabular widths.

changes.description: Combat Power formatting is now consistent.
changes.details: CP values now always render with two decimal places, matching the item level format and preventing row segments from shifting because of different decimal lengths.

changes.description: Roster-wide task tracking is now scoped per roster.
changes.details: Chaos Gate and Field Boss tracking/completion now use roster-level state instead of relying on an arbitrary character row, with a migration that normalizes existing roster-wide task data.

changes.description: Guardian Raid clears can sync from LOA Logs encounters.
changes.details: Known Guardian Raid bosses in encounters.db now auto-complete the character's Guardian Raid daily for the current reset day. Argeos is intentionally excluded because the winter event is tracked manually.

changes.description: Temporary roster events are supported.
changes.details: The Argeos Winter Event was added as a manually completed roster-wide event with 3 weekly completions and a 1-per-day limit. It can be disabled again from the roster-wide task toggle in Tracking settings.

changes.description: Roster event progress can be corrected manually.
changes.details: Tracking settings now includes a 0-3 weekly completion input for the Argeos event, so users can enter already completed event runs if they did them while the app was closed.

changes.description: Roster event completions no longer duplicate rows.
changes.details: Toggling the event completion during the same daily cycle now updates the existing completion_status row instead of inserting a new one every time. Existing duplicate daily event rows are ignored by progress counts and cleaned up on the next toggle.

changes.description: Roster event state stays synced across tabs.
changes.details: Event changes from the Todo tab, Tracking tab, and dashboard now refresh each other so the weekly input, completion button, and dashboard label all follow the same completion_status data.

changes.description: The dashboard now shows an Argeos event label.
changes.details: A Stoopid Argeos dashboard label was added with the event icon, showing how many tracked rosters are open today, done today, or fully done for the week.

changes.description: Reset countdown wording now highlights weekly reset.
changes.details: After the Tuesday 10:00 UTC daily reset, the header countdown switches to Next weekly reset in until Wednesday 10:00 UTC, then returns to the normal next daily reset wording.

changes.description: Roster selection now uses ordered buttons.
changes.details: Todo, Tracking, and Raid settings now use compact roster buttons instead of a dropdown. Buttons follow the user's roster order and use the same active styling as the header settings buttons.

changes.description: Task icons were updated for events and Paradise.
changes.details: Event tasks now use the new event_quest.webp icon, and Paradise tasks use the new paradise.webp icon in dashboard and Todo task displays.
